name: Virtual Army: Revolution
short_description: Team based arcade multiplayer FPS for Virtual Reality. Virtual Army: Revolution immerses players into the most gritty and chaotic modern combat experience.
detailed_description:
Team based arcade multiplayer FPS for Virtual Reality.
Virtual Army: Revolution immerses players into the most gritty and chaotic modern combat experience.

Casual gameplay with ranking and progression.

Available for Arcades on SpringboardVR
Available for Arcades on SynthesisVR
Available for Arcades on PrivateLabelVR

General
  • Casual / arcade gameplay
  • Play standing or seated.
  • Crossplay with PC players (Mouse & Keyboard)
  • Arcade mode for commercial venues

Features
  • 5 v 5 online multiplayer
  • 10 maps (small - medium size)
  • 4 game modes: Free-For-All, Team Deathmatch, Domination, Gun Game
  • Reloading - Automatic & Manual
  • Progression: Ranking, unlocks, weapon skins and attachments
  • Bots
